question: What color is the watermark text visible in the bottom left corner? A. Green B. Red C. Black D. Silver
How many silver blades does the lime green robot hold in its hands during the first 12 seconds?

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A lime green plastic robot figure with a red chest emblem and black mechanical joints stands on a white surface. The figure holds silver and green bladed weapons in its hands. Human hands enter the frame to hold and manipulate the robot's legs and torso. Green text reading 'Hero-Factory.blogspot.com' is visible in the bottom left corner.

question: Which of the previously seen robot configurations is back on screen? A. lime green robot holding a silver chain B. lime green robot holding a claw-like weapon C. lime green robot holding silver and green bladed weapons D. lime green robot holding a scythe-like weapon

A. only blades in both hands held B. only projectile weapon in right hand held C. both blades in both hands and projectile weapon in right hand held D. neither blades in both hands nor projectile weapon in right hand held

What action are the human hands performing on the green figure? A. wielding blades B. standing still C. holding figure D. transitioning light
Describe the visual changes occurring to the robot figure and background throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the background shifts from dark to bright white; at 10s, the robot extends both arms outward with blades; at 12s, the right arm extends forward holding a silver weapon; at 16s, the black skeletal torso and lime-green armor plates are shown clearly.

What manipulation occurs to the robot figure's weapon attachments?
canonical_answer: Human hands adjust and reposition the robot's arm-mounted blades.
